STDM_0809001_0010.Text: Oh, I'm sure it'll be fine.

STDM_0809001_0015.Text: We are the strongest after all.

STDM_0809001_0040.Text: Satoru Gojo, Jujutsu High Second-Year Student

STDM_0809001_0050.Text: Looking out for the weak and protecting them is honestly so exhausting.

STDM_0809001_0060.Text: Satoru, it's not nice to pick on the weak, you know.

STDM_0809001_0070.Text: Suguru Geto, Jujutsu High Second-Year Student

STDM_0809001_0080.Text: Survival of the weakest. That's the proper shape of a proper society.

STDM_0809001_0090.Text: This mission is being assigned to you two. The Star Plasma Vessel is the one compatible with Tengen. You are to escort that girl...and erase her.

STDM_0809001_0100.Text: If you fail, the effects will ripple throughout even normal society... So put your heart into this!

STDM_0809001_0110.Text: "Q" Departure of Top Combatant, Bayer, Leads to Organization's Collapse

STDM_0809001_0120.Text: But sure, count me in on all the fun.

STDM_0809001_0130.Text: I'm going up against the Gojo clan's kid. I wouldn't be able to do anything if I just popped up in front of him.

STDM_0809001_0140.Text: I have to wear him down a bit using some idiots first.

STDM_0809001_0160.Text: I'm counting on you, Sorcerer Killer.

STDM_0809001_0165.Text: I almost forgot. How's Megumi doing?

STDM_0809001_0210.Text: Tokyo Jujutsu High, Foothills of Mt. Mushiro

STDM_0809001_0230.Text: We're now inside Jujutsu High's barrier.

STDM_0809001_0240.Text: You really worked hard this time, Satoru.

STDM_0809001_0250.Text: Ugh... I never want to get stuck again babysitting some kid!

STDM_0809001_0270.Text: Excuse me, but have we met before?

STDM_0809001_0280.Text: Yeah, we have, but don't worry about it. I'm terrible at remembering guys' names, too.

STDM_0809101_0030.Text: It felt like nothing more than passing a safety pin through a big hole in a knit sweater. But seriously, I'm fine.

STDM_0809101_0040.Text: You make sure Amanai is safe. I'll deal with this guy myself.

STDM_0809101_0050.Text: Go, Suguru. Take her. Make sure you two get her to Tengen.

STDM_0809101_0080.Text: All right, let's get this over with.

STDM_0809101_0090.Text: I had hoped to take you down with that earlier attack, but I guess I've lost my edge.

STDM_0809101_0100.Text: The bounty on Amanai has already been taken down, you idiot!

STDM_0809101_0110.Text: I'm the one who took it down, you arrogant bastard.

STDM_0809101_0120.Text: When facing people without openings like you, you have to first create ups and downs leading to several false goals.

STDM_0809101_0130.Text: If I hadn't set that time limit on the bounty, then chances are you wouldn't have released your Technique until the very end.

STDM_0809102_0010.Text: I had a feeling there was something off about him. He has zero Cursed Energy!

STDM_0809102_0020.Text: He has a Heavenly Pact, gifting him physical prowess.

STDM_0809103_0030.Text: Now there's no cover. From now on, he can't launch any surprise attacks.

STDM_0809103_0050.Text: So you're using them to hide?

STDM_0809103_0060.Text: He's created a blind spot. I should use Blue again...

STDM_0809103_0080.Text: His intuition is keen enough to sense me empty-handed.

STDM_0809103_0090.Text: However...that finally got you to focus on defense with your Technique.

STDM_0809201_0020.Text: Yeah. Right now, we're in Tengen's territory.

STDM_0809201_0030.Text: This is the foundation of the nation's key barriers, the main hall of the Tombs of the Star.

STDM_0809201_0040.Text: Once you descend the stairs, pass through the gate, and continue on to the base of the big tree,

STDM_0809201_0050.Text: Tengen will protect you until the assimilation's over.

STDM_0809201_0060.Text: That, or we can turn back around and go home with Kuroi.

STDM_0809201_0080.Text: Before we even met you, Satoru and I had already talked it over.

STDM_0809201_0090.Text: What if the Star Plasma Vessel kid refuses to assimilate?

STDM_0809201_0100.Text: Then the whole thing...gets called off!

STDM_0809201_0120.Text: Well, if you decide that on your own, it might mean you have to fight Tengen.

STDM_0809201_0140.Text: It'll be fine. It'll all work out somehow.

STDM_0809201_0150.Text: We're the strongest students at Jujutsu High School.

STDM_0809201_0160.Text: So no matter what decision you make, Satoru and I will guarantee your future.

STDM_0809201_0180.Text: I've always known I was special. Everyone kept telling me that I was different.

STDM_0809201_0190.Text: But being special was normal to me,

STDM_0809201_0200.Text: and I've lived my life trying to avoid danger as much as possible for the sake of this day.

STDM_0809201_0210.Text: I figured everything would be fine, even if I was taken away from everyone and assimilated.

STDM_0809201_0230.Text: I want to stay with everyone!

STDM_0809201_0240.Text: I don't want to go! I'm not ready yet! I want to travel and have fun! I want to see and do all kinds of things!

STDM_0809201_0280.Text: Okay, job's done. You're free to go now.

STDM_0809201_0290.Text: How were you able to get to this place?

STDM_0809201_0310.Text: Ohh, I get what you're asking.

STDM_0809201_0320.Text: Satoru Gojo tried stopping me, so I had to kill him.

STDM_0809202_0010.Text: How did you know which path led to the Tombs of the Star? We didn't leave even the slightest residuals behind.

STDM_0809202_0020.Text: Humans leave plenty of traces aside from residuals,

STDM_0809202_0030.Text: like scents, footprints, and so on. My pact enhances all five of my senses, too.

STDM_0809202_0040.Text: There should have been another woman on the way here. What happened to her?

STDM_0809202_0050.Text: Hm? Oh, that maid. She's probably dead. I didn't really care if she lived or died.

STDM_0809202_0060.Text: If she's lucky, she might still be alive.

STDM_0809202_0070.Text: Is that so? You know, I really think you should die.

STDM_0809203_0030.Text: His Cursed Spirit may have a unique ability, but it's not that strong by itself. I can absorb it!

STDM_0809203_0040.Text: That'll lock down his armory. Then I can just brute force it.

STDM_0809203_0060.Text: I didn't cut you badly enough to kill you.

STDM_0809203_0070.Text: Although, I would have killed you if you were a Shikigami user. But with Curse Manipulation,

STDM_0809203_0080.Text: there's no telling what might happen to the Cursed Spirits you've absorbed after you die.

STDM_0809203_0090.Text: I'd rather avoid the extra trouble if I can. You have the blessing of parentage.

STDM_0809203_0100.Text: But even with that blessing, you were both beaten by a monkey like me who can't even use Cursed Techniques.

STDM_0809203_0110.Text: You want to live a long life, don't forget that.

STDM_0809203_0140.Text: I gave him the name Megumi.

STDM_0809301_0010.Text: The corpse of the slain Star Plasma Vessel, Riko Amanai, was brought to the residence of the Star Religious Group by Toji Fushiguro.

STDM_0809301_0020.Text: The Star Religious Group representative, Shigeru Sonoda, and mediator Shiu Kong were present for the handoff.

STDM_0809301_0030.Text: Hey, there. It's been a while, huh?

STDM_0809301_0050.Text: I'm for real real. I'm still alive and kickin'!

STDM_0809301_0080.Text: I could never do that 'til now!

STDM_0809301_0090.Text: But I finally grasped it on the verge of death! The true essence of Cursed Energy!

STDM_0809301_0100.Text: The reason you're going to lose is because you didn't chop my head off! And because you didn't use that Cursed Tool when you stabbed me in the head!

STDM_0809301_0120.Text: Our fight is just getting started.

STDM_0809301_0130.Text: Is that right? You could be right...

STDM_0809302_0020.Text: but I have to admit—I'm not even angry about you anymore.

STDM_0809302_0030.Text: I bear no grudges. The world feels so, so wonderful right now.

STDM_0809302_0040.Text: Throughout heaven and earth, I alone am the honored one.

STDM_0809302_0050.Text: Take the Amplified and the Reversal, and smash together those two different infinities to create imaginary mass, imaginary Technique...

STDM_0809303_0020.Text:
"I refuse to do any work for free."
Normally, I would have said that and hightailed it out of there.

STDM_0809303_0030.Text: Yet the freshly awakened wielder of the Limitless Technique was right before my eyes. He was probably the strongest Jujutsu Sorcerer of the modern age.

STDM_0809303_0040.Text: I wanted to reject him. I wanted to bring him to his knees.

STDM_0809303_0050.Text: I wanted to take down the pinnacle of the Jujutsu world and the Zen'in clan that rejected me.

STDM_0809303_0060.Text: I've twisted myself into knots for so long, all to try justifying my life,

STDM_0809303_0070.Text: but that was the moment I truly lost.

STDM_0809303_0080.Text: I thought you had abandoned that pride.

STDM_0809303_0090.Text: I thought you had chosen to live without respecting yourself—or anyone else, for that matter.

STDM_0809303_0100.Text: Do you have any last words that you would like to say?

STDM_0809303_0120.Text: Two or three years from now, my kid will be sold off to the Zen'in clan.

STDM_0809303_0130.Text: Do what you will with that.

STDM_0809303_0140.Text: After that, Jujutsu High second-year student Satoru Gojo went to retrieve the body of the Star Plasma Vessel, Riko Amanai, from a Star Religious Group facility.

STDM_0809303_0150.Text: Shortly thereafter, he was joined by his peer, Suguru Geto.

STDM_0809303_0160.Text: You're late, Suguru. Actually, I guess you got here fast.

STDM_0809303_0200.Text: I see you already saw Shoko.

STDM_0809303_0210.Text: Yeah. She was able to heal me. I'm feeling fine again.

STDM_0809303_0220.Text: But, that doesn't change anything here, does it?

STDM_0809303_0230.Text: I screwed up pretty bad. You're not the one at fault.

STDM_0809303_0270.Text: The way I am right now, I doubt I'd feel anything.

STDM_0809303_0300.Text: Does there really need to be any point to it?

STDM_0809303_0310.Text: It's very important that there is.

STDM_0809401_0030.Text: The frequent disasters of the past year probably played a role. The Cursed Spirits were springing up like maggots.

STDM_0809401_0050.Text: No one else understands what Cursed Spirits taste like. It's like swallowing a dirty rag that's been used to clean up shit and vomit.

STDM_0809401_0060.Text: Who am I doing this for?

STDM_0809401_0070.Text: Ever since that day, I've been telling myself what I witnessed isn't uncommon.

STDM_0809401_0090.Text: I like doing something not everybody else can do! And I like working hard!

STDM_0809401_0100.Text: Did you know? Cursed Spirits aren't born from Sorcerers.

STDM_0809401_0120.Text: Then you could solve the problem by killing all non-Sorcerers.

STDM_0809401_0150.Text: Just keep picking non-Sorcerers, and force them to become Sorcerers as a survival strategy. You would be forcing them to evolve.

STDM_0809401_0160.Text: But unfortunately, I'm not crazy enough to do that.

STDM_0809401_0180.Text: The part of you who despises non-Sorcerers, and the part of you who rejects that.

STDM_0809401_0185.Text: It's up to you to decide which part becomes your true feelings from here on out.

STDM_0809401_0200.Text: Their faith in Ubusunagami... That was a local deity. That was a First-Grade case!

STDM_0809401_0210.Text: The marathon game of being a Jujutsu Sorcerer. If the only thing waiting at the end is a mountain of our comrades' corpses, then...

STDM_0809401_0220.Text: Report: Investigation into Murders Related to Our School's Students

STDM_0809401_0240.Text: What do you mean, what? These two are responsible for the latest incidents, aren't they?

STDM_0809401_0260.Text: Under Investigation: Suguru Geto, Tokyo School Third-Year Student

STDM_0809401_0270.Text: Everyone. Why don't we all step outside for a second?

STDM_0809401_0280.Text: Suguru Geto is currently on the run.

STDM_0809401_0283.Text: In accordance with Jujutsu Regulation 9, he will face execution.

STDM_0809401_0300.Text: You're really going to kill all non-Jujutsu Sorcerers now?! You know that's impossible!

STDM_0809401_0310.Text: You're so arrogant. You could do it yourself, Satoru, couldn't you?

STDM_0809401_0320.Text: That you would try to convince someone else that it's impossible to do something which is possible for you.

STDM_0809401_0330.Text: Do you think that you're the strongest because you're Satoru Gojo? Or are you Satoru Gojo because you're the strongest?

STDM_0809401_0340.Text: Just what are you trying to say?

STDM_0809401_0350.Text: I've made my decision. Now, it's just a matter of doing the best I can to achieve it.

STDM_0809401_0360.Text: Yaga, you think that I'm strong?

STDM_0809401_0380.Text: Yeah, but, apparently being strong isn't enough. The only ones that I can save are the ones waiting to be saved by someone.

STDM_0809401_0420.Text: Try to get strong. Strong enough to keep up with me.

STDM_0809401_0460.Text: Of course he does. What kind of nonsense is that?

STDM_0809401_0490.Text: Hey! That's one of those expensive chairs, isn't it?

STDM_0809401_0500.Text: Please don't fall asleep after you summon us.
